components.name: Avatar
components.description: Container for avatar. Tracks image load state.

directives.description: Container for avatar. Tracks image load state.
Image element within a `[kjAvatar]` container.
Fallback shown when image is unavailable.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Marks an element as a badge via data attributes.

directives.description: Marks an element as a badge via data attributes.

components.name: Button
components.description: Enhances a native `<button>` with variant, size, disabled state, and focus-ring behavior.

directives.description: Enhances a native `<button>` with variant, size, disabled state, and focus-ring behavior.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Adds checkbox semantics with Angular forms integration. Supports `formControl`, `formControlName`, and `ngModel` bindings.

directives.description: Adds checkbox semantics with Angular forms integration. Supports `formControl`, `formControlName`, and `ngModel` bindings.

components.name: Input
components.description: Enhances a native `<input>` with Angular forms integration, disabled/invalid state, and focus-ring. Supports `formControl`, `formControlName`, and `ngModel` bindings.

directives.description: Enhances a native `<input>` with Angular forms integration, disabled/invalid state, and focus-ring. Supports `formControl`, `formControlName`, and `ngModel` bindings.

components.name: Radio
components.description: Container for a group of radio buttons. Manages the selected value.

directives.description: Container for a group of radio buttons. Manages the selected value.
Individual radio button within a `[kjRadioGroup]`. Includes CVA for forms integration.

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Adds toggle (press) behavior with Angular forms integration.

directives.description: Adds toggle (press) behavior with Angular forms integration.

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Root dialog container. Uses Angular CDK `Dialog` service for proper overlay, focus trap, backdrop, and Escape key handling. The `kjDialogContent` directive marks the template to portal into the overlay. The trigger opens it; Escape and backdrop click close it automatically via CDK.

directives.description: Root dialog container. Uses Angular CDK `Dialog` service for proper overlay, focus trap, backdrop, and Escape key handling. The `kjDialogContent` directive marks the template to portal into the overlay. The trigger opens it; Escape and backdrop click close it automatically via CDK.
examples: Settings

directives.description: Marks an `<ng-template>` as the dialog content to render in the overlay.
Trigger button that opens the dialog.

components.name: Menu
components.description: Dropdown menu trigger. Wraps CDK `CdkMenuTrigger`. Handles aria-expanded, keyboard opening (Enter/Space/ArrowDown), and menu positioning. Apply to a `<button>` and link to a `[kjMenu]` template via `[cdkMenuTriggerFor]`.

directives.description: Dropdown menu trigger. Wraps CDK `CdkMenuTrigger`. Handles aria-expanded, keyboard opening (Enter/Space/ArrowDown), and menu positioning. Apply to a `<button>` and link to a `[kjMenu]` template via `[cdkMenuTriggerFor]`.
Menu panel container. Wraps CDK `CdkMenu`. Handles keyboard navigation (Arrow keys, Home, End, Escape, typeahead). Add `role="menu"` for proper ARIA semantics.
Individual menu item. Wraps CDK `CdkMenuItem`. Handles keyboard activation (Enter/Space), disabled state, and submenu support.

components.name: Popover
components.description: Root popover container. Uses `KjOverlayService` for open state. Escape key and open/close managed via CDK-aware signals.

directives.description: Root popover container. Uses `KjOverlayService` for open state. Escape key and open/close managed via CDK-aware signals.
Trigger button. Toggles the popover and sets `aria-expanded`.
Popover content panel. Hidden when closed. Uses `hidden` attribute for accessibility-compliant visibility.

components.name: Toast
components.description: Marks an element as a toast notification with appropriate ARIA live region attributes.

directives.description: Marks an element as a toast notification with appropriate ARIA live region attributes.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Root tooltip container. Uses `KjOverlayService` for open state management. The `kjTooltipContent` element is shown/hidden via the `hidden` attribute until full portal support is added in the UI implementation layer.

directives.description: Root tooltip container. Uses `KjOverlayService` for open state management. The `kjTooltipContent` element is shown/hidden via the `hidden` attribute until full portal support is added in the UI implementation layer.
examples: Helpful text

directives.description: Trigger element for the tooltip. Shows/hides on hover and focus.
Tooltip content panel. Hidden unless triggered. Add `role="tooltip"` and an `id` matching the trigger's `aria-describedby`.

components.name: Accordion
components.description: Root accordion container. Extends CDK `CdkAccordion` for multi/single item management. Supports single or multiple expanded items.

directives.description: Root accordion container. Extends CDK `CdkAccordion` for multi/single item management. Supports single or multiple expanded items.
Individual accordion item. Extends CDK `CdkAccordionItem`. Manages expanded state via CDK's `UniqueSelectionDispatcher` for single-mode coordination.
Trigger button for an accordion item. Controls expand/collapse via CDK `toggle()`. Sets `aria-expanded` and `data-open` attributes based on the item's expanded state.
Accordion content panel. Hidden when the parent item is collapsed. Uses the `hidden` attribute for accessibility-compliant visibility.

components.name: Form
components.description: Container for a form field. Groups label, input, and error message.

directives.description: Container for a form field. Groups label, input, and error message.
examples: Name is required

directives.description: Label element within a form field.
Error message element. Visible only when field is invalid.

components.name: Select
components.description: Root select container. Wraps CDK `CdkListbox` for full keyboard navigation and ARIA listbox semantics. Manages open/close state via `kjSelectValue` model.

directives.description: Root select container. Wraps CDK `CdkListbox` for full keyboard navigation and ARIA listbox semantics. Manages open/close state via `kjSelectValue` model.
examples: Apple

directives.description: Trigger button that opens/closes the select listbox. Automatically binds `aria-expanded` to reflect open state.
Listbox container. Wraps CDK `CdkListbox` for keyboard navigation and ARIA listbox semantics. Hidden when the select is closed.
Individual option inside a `kjSelectContent`. Wraps CDK `CdkOption` for proper `aria-selected` management and keyboard navigation support. Clicking the option calls `select()` on the parent context.

components.name: Table
components.description: Wraps TanStack Angular Table. Accepts `kjTable` (columns) and `kjTableData` signal inputs and exposes the table instance (rows, headers, sorting) via the `KJ_TABLE` context token. Use `table` to access the full TanStack `Table<T>` instance in templates via `exportAs: 'kjTable'`.

directives.description: Wraps TanStack Angular Table. Accepts `kjTable` (columns) and `kjTableData` signal inputs and exposes the table instance (rows, headers, sorting) via the `KJ_TABLE` context token. Use `table` to access the full TanStack `Table<T>` instance in templates via `exportAs: 'kjTable'`.
Marks a `<th>` as a sortable column header. Sets `aria-sort` based on TanStack sort state. Clicking toggles sort direction via the TanStack column's toggle handler.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Root tabs container. Manages active tab value.

directives.description: Root tabs container. Manages active tab value.
Container for tab triggers. Sets `role="tablist"`.
Individual tab trigger. Sets `role="tab"` and manages `aria-selected`.
Tab panel content. Hidden when not active.

components.name: Chart
components.description: Wraps Apache ECharts. Initializes after first render, updates reactively, disposes on destroy. Always provide `kjChartLabel` for WCAG AAA compliance.

directives.description: Wraps Apache ECharts. Initializes after first render, updates reactively, disposes on destroy. Always provide `kjChartLabel` for WCAG AAA compliance.

components.name: A11y
components.description: Wires `aria-describedby` to one or more element IDs. Accepts a single ID string or an array of ID strings. Removes the attribute automatically when the value is empty.

directives.description: Wires `aria-describedby` to one or more element IDs. Accepts a single ID string or an array of ID strings. Removes the attribute automatically when the value is empty.
Traps keyboard focus within the host element using Angular CDK FocusTrap. Designed for modal dialogs, drawers, and other overlay patterns.
Marks an element as an ARIA live region and exposes an `announce` method for programmatically pushing announcements to screen readers via CDK LiveAnnouncer.
Marks an individual item within a `[kjRovingTabindex]` container. Its `tabindex` is managed automatically by the parent directive.
Implements the roving tabindex pattern for composite widgets such as toolbars and tab lists. Only one item has `tabindex="0"` at a time; arrow keys move focus between items.
Visually hides an element while keeping it accessible to screen readers. Uses the standard visually-hidden CSS technique via inline styles.

components.name: Primitives
components.description: Shared ControlValueAccessor primitive. Compose via `hostDirectives` on any form input directive (KjInputDirective, KjCheckboxDirective, etc.) to wire Angular reactive forms and template-driven forms automatically. The host directive calls `notifyChange(value)` on user input and `notifyTouched()` on blur. The directive handles all CVA plumbing.

directives.description: Shared ControlValueAccessor primitive. Compose via `hostDirectives` on any form input directive (KjInputDirective, KjCheckboxDirective, etc.) to wire Angular reactive forms and template-driven forms automatically. The host directive calls `notifyChange(value)` on user input and `notifyTouched()` on blur. The directive handles all CVA plumbing.
Applies disabled state to any element via ARIA and data attributes. Compose via `hostDirectives` on other directives to add disabled behavior.

Tracks focus-visible state using the CDK FocusMonitor with a fallback to direct event listeners for test environments (jsdom). Sets `data-focus-visible` when the element receives focus. Compose via `hostDirectives` to add focus-ring behavior to interactive elements.
